name: Sim0n
subtitle: El Arquitecto
description: Lean man with sharp eyes, wearing a dark hoodie with glowing circuit patterns, fingerless gloves, and combat boots. Hair slicked back with a single streak of electric blue.

dialogs.intro: Yo diseno tu derrota antes de que empiece la pelea.
dialogs.victory: Todo salio segun el plano. Como siempre.

name: Carl0s
subtitle: El Toro
description: Massive bull-like man with broad shoulders, scarred arms, red bandana, torn sleeveless shirt, thick gold chain, and a permanent scowl. Dark skin, shaved head.

dialogs.intro: Cuando el toro embiste, nadie queda de pie.
dialogs.victory: Ole! Otro que muerde el polvo!

name: Mar1a
subtitle: La Centella
description: Petite woman with lightning-fast movements, bright yellow sports top, short spiky platinum hair, electric tattoos running down both arms, lightweight sneakers.

dialogs.intro: Parpadea y ya perdiste, mi amor.
dialogs.victory: Rapida como el rayo, bonita como el sol!
dialogs.defeat: Ay no... se me rompio una una...

name: D1ego
subtitle: El Fantasma
description: Slim mysterious figure in a long pale coat with hood partially covering his face, bandages on his hands, ghostly pale skin, silver eyes, moves like smoke.

dialogs.intro: No puedes golpear lo que no puedes ver.
dialogs.victory: Desaparezco... como si nunca hubiera estado aqui.
dialogs.defeat: Parece que este fantasma... fue exorcizado.

name: Luc1a
subtitle: La Tormenta
description: Athletic woman with wild curly dark hair flowing like storm clouds, deep purple bodysuit with lightning accents, stormy grey eyes, wind-swept cape.

dialogs.intro: La tormenta no pide permiso para llegar.
dialogs.victory: Despues de la tormenta... no queda nada de ti!
dialogs.defeat: Hasta las tormentas... se calman eventualmente.

name: Pabl0
subtitle: El Titan
description: Enormous wrestler-type man with a lucha libre mask in green and gold, bare chest showing massive muscles, championship belt, spiked wristbands.

dialogs.intro: El Titan no cae. El Titan APLASTA.

name: El3na
subtitle: La Serpiente
description: Lithe woman with long black hair in a braid, green scaled bodysuit, snake fang earrings, sharp nails painted emerald, moves with serpentine grace.

dialogs.intro: Ssss... ven mas cerca, no muerdo... mucho.
dialogs.victory: Otro raton atrapado en mis anillos!

name: M1guel
subtitle: El Martillo
description: Stocky blacksmith-type man with thick forearms, leather apron over bare chest, heavy boots, soot-covered face, wild red beard, carries invisible hammer.

dialogs.intro: Cada golpe mio es como un martillazo en el yunque!
dialogs.victory: Forjado en fuego, templado en victoria!
dialogs.defeat: Creo que me... doble el martillo...

name: S0fia
subtitle: La Bruja
description: Mystical woman with glowing violet eyes, dark flowing robes with constellation patterns, silver crescent moon headpiece, floating arcane symbols around her hands.

dialogs.intro: Las estrellas ya me dijeron que gano yo.
dialogs.victory: La magia siempre vence a los punos, tonto!
dialogs.defeat: Mi bola de cristal... no vio esto venir...

name: Andr3s
subtitle: El Rayo
description: Wiry young man with electric blue mohawk, sleeveless lightning-bolt jacket, ripped jeans, chain accessories, manic grin, crackling energy around fists.

dialogs.intro: Soy tan rapido que me pego a mi mismo por accidente!
dialogs.victory: Zas! Ni me viste! Bueno, ya no ves nada...

name: Val3ntina
subtitle: La Fiera
description: Fierce woman with wild crimson hair, tiger-stripe face paint, torn military pants, wrapped fists, combat scars, ferocious amber eyes, fanged grin.

dialogs.intro: Huele a miedo aqui... y me ENCANTA.
dialogs.defeat: Grrr... esto no se queda asi...

name: Juan
subtitle: El Muro
description: Gigantic stoic man built like a concrete wall, grey military buzz cut, stone-colored skin, heavy iron gauntlets, thick neck, unmoving expression, cracked ground beneath feet.

dialogs.intro: Golpeame. Anda. Necesito saber si aun siento algo.
dialogs.victory: No me movi. Tu si. Al suelo.
dialogs.defeat: Hasta los muros... caen... algun dia...

name: Cam1la
subtitle: La Sombra
description: Ninja-like woman in dark purple and black, face mask, short dark hair with violet tips, throwing daggers strapped to thighs, moves like a shadow, pale skin.

dialogs.intro: Cuando me veas, ya sera demasiado tarde.

name: Mat3o
subtitle: El Volcan
description: Hulking man with obsidian skin cracked with glowing magma lines, shirtless, volcanic rock pauldrons, smoke rising from shoulders, burning orange eyes, molten fists.

dialogs.intro: La lava sube... y cuando exploto, NADIE se salva!
dialogs.victory: ERUPCION TOTAL! Quien quiere ser ceniza?!
dialogs.defeat: El volcan... se apago... necesito magma...

name: Isab3lla
subtitle: La Rosa
description: Elegant woman with rose-pink hair in an updo, thorned vine bracelets, flowing red dress with armored corset, graceful fighting stance, beauty mark, confident smile.

dialogs.intro: Toda rosa tiene espinas. Las mias son de acero.

name: Sant1ago
subtitle: El Lobo
description: Lean predatory man with silver-white hair, wolf pelt draped over one shoulder, claw-mark scars across chest, feral yellow eyes, sharp canines, crouched stance.

dialogs.intro: La manada no necesita piedad. Yo tampoco.
dialogs.victory: Auuuuu! El lobo come esta noche!
dialogs.defeat: Un lobo herido... es aun mas peligroso... recuerdalo.

name: Dan1ela
subtitle: La Estrella
description: Confident woman with star-shaped hair clips, gold and white fighting outfit, radiant aura, warm brown skin, bright smile, balanced athletic build, star tattoo on cheek.

dialogs.intro: Todas las estrellas brillan. Yo brillo MAS.
dialogs.victory: Estrella fugaz! Pediste un deseo? Tarde!
dialogs.defeat: Hasta las estrellas... se apagan... pero vuelven a salir.

name: F3lipe
subtitle: El Trueno
description: Towering man with a thundercloud mohawk, metallic armor on one arm, exposed muscular torso with storm tattoos, heavy boots that crack the ground, deep booming voice.

dialogs.intro: Escuchas eso? Es el trueno que viene por ti.
dialogs.victory: BOOM! El trueno siempre llega despues del rayo!
dialogs.defeat: El cielo... se despeja... por ahora...
